title: terniopsis malayana
intro: Terniopsis malayana, also known as the Malay Terniopsis or Malay Terniopsis Tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Ochnaceae. It is a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia, and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been shown to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, contributing to various health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparation of Terniopsis malayana often involves boiling the leaves and stems in water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
